name: Science
description: Core physical-science reference: constants and essentials.
primer:
## Science
Foundational physical-science facts worth knowing cold.
- **Physical constants** — the fundamental constants with values across SI, Gaussian-cgs and natural units, plus the unit-system ideas ($c=\hbar=1$, dimensionless invariants).
- **Science essentials** — SI base units and prefixes, the periodic table, and other reference facts.

The through-line: precise quantities and the units that carry them.
